order_unit_single_origin_chk.name: order_unit_single_origin_chk
order_unit_single_origin_chk.value: NOT ("order_unit"."order_line_id" IS NOT NULL AND "order_unit"."purchase_order_line_id" IS NOT NULL)

partner_task_single_origin_chk.name: partner_task_single_origin_chk
partner_task_single_origin_chk.value: ("partner_task"."kind" = 'request' AND "partner_task"."purchase_order_id" IS NULL) OR ("partner_task"."kind" = 'supplier_pickup' AND "partner_task"."purchase_order_id" IS NOT NULL AND "partner_task"."request_id" IS NULL)

request_order_delivery_part_unique_idx.name: request_order_delivery_part_unique_idx
request_order_delivery_part_unique_idx.where: "request"."quote_number" IS NOT NULL AND "request"."delivery_part_number" IS NOT NULL
